name: Khong Guan Limited
summary: Khong Guan Limited, an investment holding company, trades in wheat flour and other edible products in Singapore and Malaysia. It is involved in the wholesale of wheat flour, biscuits, general goods, and other consumer goods. The company also trades in shares listed primarily in Singapore and Malaysia. It also exports its products to approximately 30 countries worldwide. The company was formerly known as Khong Guan Flour Milling Limited and changed its name to Khong Guan Limited in November 2016. Khong Guan Limited was incorporated in 1960 and is headquartered in Singapore.
